celebration: CAST REUNION — the whole class meets at the vet

songs.title: V-V-Vet
songs.lyrics:
[Intro — whispered]
vvv… vvv… vvv…
(teeth on lip, a buzzing motor)

[Hook 1 — kids chant]
V! V! V-v-v!
What begins with V?
V-v-van! V-v-van!
It's a van! (a van!)

[Hook 2 — kids chant]
V! V! V-v-v!
What begins with V?
V-v-violin! V-v-violin!
It's a violin! (a violin!)

[Hook 3 — kids chant]
V! V! V-v-v!
What begins with V?
V-v-vase! V-v-vase!
It's a vase! (a vase!)

[Breakdown — whispered, bass drops out]
vvv… vvv… (the motor is ON)
fff… (off) … vvv… (on)
fan… van… fan… van…

[Bridge]
A potato?! (NO!)
P-p-potato! Not V!
(vvv… vvv…)

[Final Hook — big]
V! V! V-v-v!
V-v-volcano! V-v-volcano!
It's a volcano, volcano, volcano!
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: The V sound is a VOICED buzz /v/ — top teeth on bottom lip with the motor running, NEVER 'vee' (letter name) and NEVER 'vuh' (schwa). The breakdown is the crucial contrast: /f/ is the SAME mouth with the motor OFF, /v/ with it ON (fan vs van). Hold both against the 808 hum. Answer line 'It's a ___!' reuses the Week 1 frame.

songs.title: The Vet
songs.lyrics:
[Intro — warm]
(the whole class is here…)

[Hook]
The cat is at the vet!
The dog is at the vet!
Who is at the vet? (all of us! all of us!)
We are at the vet!

[Verse 2]
The rat is at the vet!
The bug is at the vet!
Who is at the vet? (all of us! all of us!)
The duck is at the vet!

[Verse 3]
The ant is at the vet!
A van is at the vet!
Sam is at the vet!
Sejeena is at the vet!

[Outro]
And the vet is… a potato!
(POTATO!)
We are all at the vet…
(together… shhh…)
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: The reunion anthem — warm, not spooky. One frame: 'The ___ is at the vet.' cycling the WHOLE cast (cat, dog, rat, bug, duck, ant, Sam, Segina). This is the year's family gathering; let the choir swell on 'all of us!'. The 'we are' line is sung, not printed (it's oral — the printed materials stay strictly decodable).

spreads.artNote: A warm little vet's clinic under a gentle spotlight — a kindly vet in a white coat with a stethoscope, waiting room chairs, a green cross. The whole family is about to arrive.

spreads.text: The cat is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: The Cat (tabby) sitting on the vet's table, one paw bandaged, dignified. Cast reunion begins.

spreads.text: The dog is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: The Dog (brown) with a cone collar, big sad eyes, tail giving one hopeful wag.

spreads.text: The rat is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: The Rat (grey) tiny on the huge table, tail wrapped in a miniature bandage, trying to look brave.

spreads.text: The bug is at the vet!
spreads.artNote: The Bug (red-shelled) upside-down on a tiny cushion, legs in the air, the vet peering through a magnifying glass.

spreads.text: The duck is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: The Duck (white) with a sock still in its bill and a thermometer, refusing to sit still. Cheeky as ever.

spreads.text: The ant is at the vet!
spreads.artNote: The Ant (black) so small the vet needs a microscope; a comically enormous scene for a comically tiny patient.

spreads.text: A van is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: A little van parked outside the clinic window — this is how the whole family arrived together. Warm reveal.

spreads.text: Sam is at the vet. Segina is at the vet.
spreads.artNote: Sam and Segina the peg dolls sitting side by side in the waiting-room chairs, holding the pet carriers, proud caretakers.
The kindly vet turns around — it is the POTATO in a tiny white coat and round glasses, stethoscope on. No noun printed — the class SHOUTS the word from the picture.

spreads.text: The bug is on the cat. The cat is on the dog. On the mat!
spreads.artNote: The warm closing pile-up: the whole cast heaped happily together on the familiar mat back home — bug on cat on dog, duck and rat tucked in, Sam and Segina laughing. Everyone is fine. Home.

sentences: The cat is at the vet.
The dog is at the vet.
A van is at the vet.
The bug is on the cat.
extras: Motor on / motor off: hand on the throat, feel /v/ buzz (motor on) vs /f/ (motor off) — fan/van, fin/vin, fat/vat
The reunion tray: gather all eight cast figures (Segina, Sam, Cat, Ant, Dog, Rat, Bug, Duck) and drive them to the toy vet in the van
Moveable alphabet: build v-e-t, v-a-n, v-a-t and read them off the vet's chart

REUSED FROM WEEK 1 — a potato wearing tiny round glasses standing at a miniature whiteboard with a pointer, teaching, deadpan, ultra-realistic photograph, single subject centered, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

teacherFocus: Teach /v/ as the VOICED twin of /f/ — same mouth, motor on. Hand on the throat: feel van buzz, feel fan go quiet. This is the reunion week: gather every one of the eight cast figures and bring them to the vet in the van. The book is the year's warm family gathering — read the pile-up ending slowly and let them name every friend who is home safe.
